center.name: Henrik Grønvold
center.summary: Henrik Grønvold是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Arabian golden sparrow，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|right|An illustration of an Arabian golden sparrow (above) and a yellow-throated petronia (below) by [[Henrik Grönvold]] The Arabian golden sparrow (Passer euchlorus) is a sparrow found in south west Arabia and also the coast of Somalia and Djibouti where it occurs in thorn savannah and scrub habitats

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: thumb|right|An illustration of an Arabian golden sparrow (above) and a yellow-throated petronia (below) by [[Henrik Grönvold]] The Arabian golden sparrow (Passer euchlorus) is a sparrow found in south west Arabia and also the coast of Somalia and Djibouti where it occurs in thorn savannah and scrub habitats
